site.description: Multicamera recording, streaming, and audiovisual production for live performances.

hero.title: Live Recording
hero.subtitle: Capture the essence of your performance

intro.title: Live Record Any Performance
paragraphs: Dangerous Meeting brings together audiovisual production and creative direction to capture live performances with a direct, powerful, and carefully crafted approach.
The service combines multicamera recording, live direction, streaming, and audio production so every concert keeps the real energy of the stage.
We work with setups prepared for venues, studios, and events, taking care of both image and final sound to deliver pieces ready to share.

gallery.title: Our Work in Pictures
gallery.subtitle: A closer look at live sessions, stage coverage, and production moments.
gallery.label: Gallery

videos.title: Live Recording Examples
videos.subtitle: Real examples of live recording, mixing and production projects.

contact.title: Contact
contact.social: You can also follow us on Instagram and YouTube.

services.title: Services
services.description: We record and produce live performances with video, audio, and streaming solutions adapted to each event.

about.title: About
paragraphs: We are a team dedicated to recording live events, with experience in audiovisual production, sound, and multicamera direction.
Our goal is to capture every performance with technical quality and respect for the energy of the live show.
We cover everything from concerts and venue sessions to pieces prepared for social channels, YouTube, and promotional material.
